text: Task auto-created from audit "Equipment Safety Audit - Chicago" (AUD-003). Failed item: Refrigeration unit compliance.
Ordered the replacement compressor seal from approved vendor. ETA 2 business days.
Please prioritize this — we need the freezer back to compliance before the health department follow-up on the 20th.
Technician confirmed for March 17. Will need 4-hour window for install and testing.
Task auto-created from audit "Equipment Safety Audit - Chicago" (AUD-003). Failed item: Staff temperature logging.
Training presentation drafted. Will schedule sessions for morning and evening shifts next week.
This is a priority item from the CAPA review. Please ensure all materials reference the latest FDA guidelines.
Reviewed the current deck — it needs significant updates. Will have a draft ready by the 15th.
Got 3 quotes. Arctic HVAC offers best pricing with 24-hour response guarantee.
Approved Arctic HVAC. Please confirm the service date ASAP.
Confirmed for March 15th, 9:00 AM. Technician will need access to the mechanical room.
Task auto-created from audit findings. Thermometer calibration records were found to be incomplete.
Found 3 analog thermometers out of spec. Replacements ordered and installed. Digital units all pass calibration.
Sensor kits arrived. Starting installation in the walk-in cooler today.
Walk-in cooler sensors installed and transmitting data. Temperature readings look good. Moving to freezer next.
